verdict: Buy XEQT.TO at $44.86 CAD. Core is 10.6% vs 40% target — $1,872 to go. Fund first, every deposit.
Cap breaches: CEG, OSS. Do not add — shrink by dilution.
Theme concentration at 89.3%. Building XEQT core is the fix.
Skip: MSFT above no-chase; PLTR above no-chase.

warnings: UNDER-DIVERSIFIED: XEQT core is 10.6% vs 40% target (29.4pp below). Prioritize funding core.

SOFI: only $2.44 CAD room to cap — too small for a meaningful buy.
